# HELP jvm_memory_used_bytes The amount of used memory
# TYPE jvm_memory_used_bytes gauge
jvm_memory_used_bytes{area="heap",id="G1 Eden Space"} 6.7108864E7
jvm_memory_used_bytes{area="heap",id="G1 Old Gen"} 1.80355072E8
jvm_memory_used_bytes{area="heap",id="G1 Survivor Space"} 2.097152E7
jvm_memory_used_bytes{area="nonheap",id="Metaspace"} 6.5E7
jvm_memory_used_bytes{area="nonheap",id="CodeCache"} 2.0E7
